mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.textbook_name, t.type, t.description, t.textbook_publishing_house, t.textbook_publishing_time, t.textbook_version, t.release_status, t.review_status, t.classification, t.author_name, t.executive_editor, t.textbook_english_name, t.version_number, t.textbook_picture, t.creator, t.add_datetime, t.operator, t.operation_datetime, a.name AS textbook_author_name, d.name AS type_name, -- Add creator's name based on userType CASE WHEN #{userType} = 1 THEN s.name ELSE tch.name END AS creatorName, -- Add the latest review id tr.id AS reviewId FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN teacher a ON t.textbook_author_id = a.id LEFT JOIN sys_dict_data d ON t.type = d.id LEFT JOIN -- Subquery to get the latest review ID for this textbook (SELECT textbook_id, MAX(id) AS id FROM textbook_review WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId} GROUP BY textbook_id) tr ON t.id = tr.textbook_id LEFT JOIN student s ON t.creator = s.user_id LEFT JOIN teacher tch ON t.creator = tch.user_id WHERE t.id = #{textbookId}
